entries.note: V60-C reuses the shipped V60-A starter and V60-B refresh continuation surfaces by default.
V60-C keeps the advisory recommendation function extensional and replayable over the exact shipped V60-A/V60-B lineage.
V60-C requires one explicit frozen-policy anchor for replayable advisory recommendation.
V60-C keeps the selected continuation exemplar path-level and non-generalizing by default.
V60-C keeps candidate outcomes non-entitling and non-escalating by themselves.
V60-C makes provenance tags and lineage-root dedup explicit on the advisory register itself.
